name: Nitin
wishText: Thank you for being kind, patient, funny, charismatic, and everything this team looks up to.
textInChatBox: Happy Birthday, Nitin! Wishing you a massive year ahead from the entire Laing+Simmons Oakville | Windsor crew.
text2: That's what we were going to do.
text5Content: you inspire us every day with your unwavering support, incredible leadership, and genuine care for the team.
